company.name: Argilla
company.notes: Open-source data labeling / dataset curation platform. ACQUIRED by Hugging Face (2024) — argilla.io now redirects to HF. Roles flow through HF careers (Workable). Relevant for Lior's LoRA dataset fluency gap — Argilla team focuses on dataset quality.

research.status_summary: Argilla no longer exists as a standalone entity — fully absorbed into Hugging Face (acquired ~$10M, 2024) and operates as the HF data-labeling/dataset-curation team, with argilla.io redirecting to HF and all hiring flowing through HF's Workable board.
research.hiring_policy: Hugging Face is remote-first by default, distributed across 20+ countries, with ~9–11 open roles listed as of mid-2026 (mostly US/EMEA remote); HF has filed H-1B petitions historically (3 approved in FY2025, 0 denied) but volume is very low, making direct US visa sponsorship unreliable — EOR-friendly for non-US candidates is feasible given HF's global distributed structure.
recent_news: Hugging Face acquired GGML.ai (Feb 20, 2026), further deepening its open-source model-inference stack — Argilla/distilabel team benefits from tighter model+data flywheel.

Appen partnered with Hugging Face (May 6, 2026) to enhance the Open ASR Leaderboard with private audio datasets, signaling HF's push into multimodal/audio dataset curation — directly adjacent to Argilla's roadmap.

Hugging Face launched an open-source Robot App Store for Reachy Mini (May 6, 2026), expanding beyond NLP into robotics data — Argilla's synthetic/annotation tooling (distilabel 2.x, Synthetic Data Generator Space) is the upstream data layer for these new modalities.

DataCraft (Argilla's no-code synthetic data UI, launched Sep 2024) was quietly discontinued by July 2025 per third-party observations, with the Synthetic Data Generator Space (125 running instances on HF) replacing it as the canonical no-code entry point.
Argilla SDK reached v2.8.0 on PyPI (latest as of research date), confirming active maintenance; distilabel repo sits at 3.2k GitHub stars with ongoing releases.
research.growth_signal: HF parent headcount stabilized at ~679–731 (Revelio Labs Dec 2025; Tracxn Apr 2026) after 13.6% growth in 2024, with $4.5B valuation unchanged since Aug 2023 and no new funding round announced — steady but not hyper-growth phase.
research.fit_for_lior: Argilla/HF is a direct fit for Lior's LoRA dataset curation thread — distilabel + Argilla 2.x is the canonical open-source stack for building preference/instruction datasets for fine-tuning, and any product/analyst/vibe-coder role here would sit at the exact intersection of creative AI data pipelines and human-in-the-loop annotation tooling.
